title: pseudocimum tenuiflorus
intro: Pseudocimum tenuiflorus, also known as Indian borage or Mexican mint, is a perennial herb native to tropical and subtropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Pseudocimum tenuiflorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Pseudocimum tenuiflorus is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
